basics.name: Lucas Gabriel Franciscon
basics.title: Data Analyst
basics.summary: Data Analyst with a foundation in Python, SQL, and statistical analysis, pairing hands-on project work in A/B testing, hypothesis testing, and data visualization with real-world business experience applying business intelligence to operational decisions. As a business owner, used performance metrics to guide inventory, pricing, and budgeting; as an engineering intern, built analytical models and automated the tracking of test data. Skilled at turning data into clear, decision-ready insights using Python (Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly), SQL, and Excel. Trained through TripleTen's intensive Data Analysis Bootcamp, and a national STEM olympiad award winner in Brazil.

skills.note_for_tailoring: Machine Learning is foundational / in progress — present it as a learning area, not a core proven skill, until the forecasting projects ship.

experience.title: Business Owner
highlights: Own and operate a local business, managing financial analysis, budgeting, and data-driven decision-making across daily operations.
Monitor performance metrics to inform inventory, pricing, and operational-efficiency decisions.
Lead recruitment and team management, and maintain and analyze financial and operational records.

experience.title: Engineering Intern
highlights: Built and managed analytical models and technical datasets to support product development and certification.
Created automated spreadsheets to track testing parameters and performance metrics.
Conducted end-to-end R&D experiments, managing the collection and analysis of product-testing data.
Used CAD software for new-product development, testing, and certification.

projects.name: Instacart — Customer Shopping Habits
projects.description: Cleaned a large retail dataset and produced a report on customer shopping behavior, supported by data visualizations.

projects.name: Statistical Data Analysis
projects.description: Performed preliminary analysis of customer behavior and ran statistical hypothesis tests, with results visualized in charts.

projects.name: SQL Integration
projects.description: Worked with relational databases, SQL, and JSON to identify product issues, test hypotheses, and plan an advertising campaign.

projects.name: Business Analysis (BI)
projects.description: Applied business-intelligence frameworks and business-metrics analysis, building and testing hypotheses from user metrics.

projects.name: Data-Driven Business Decisions
projects.description: Ran A/B tests and statistical analyses to evaluate impact and prioritize business implementations, with results visualized in charts.

projects.name: Data Storytelling
projects.description: Completed full analysis and hypothesis testing and prepared an intuitive visual presentation to communicate findings.

projects.name: Integrated Project 2 — App UX (A/A/B Testing)
projects.description: Conducted A/A/B testing to draw conclusions about an application's user experience.

projects.name: Software Development Tools — Web App Deployment
projects.description: Built a Python web application, managed virtual environments, and deployed it to a cloud service for public access.

projects.name: Automation
projects.description: Automated repetitive data-processing tasks with Python scripting.

projects.name: Predictions and Forecasts
projects.description: Forecasted trends from historical data using Python.

projects.name: Final Project
projects.description: Capstone applying the full data-analysis lifecycle — collection, cleaning, hypothesis testing, and visualization — to a real dataset.

awards: Qualified for the second phase, Brazilian Physics Olympiad
